Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Loading Screens / Loading Screens

Loading Screens

Overview

As of May 26th 2026, there are 1,057[1] Loading Screens In-Game
“
A custom loading screen to enjoy for as short a time as possible.
”
— In-Game Description

Loading Screens are Cosmetic Items introduced in Season 3. They can be used in every mode.

Additional features available for Loading Screens

Additional features available for Loading Screens[]
Animated
  • Lynx was the first animated Loading Screen.
  • Hybrid was the second and last animated Loading Screen.
